question: When was Mercury discovered?
answer: Mercury has been known since antiquity and was visible to the naked eye, so it has no single "discovery date." It was observed and recorded by ancient civilizations long before recorded history, and ancient Greek astronomers such as Ptolemy documented it during classical antiquity. It is one of the five classical planets known to humanity since prehistoric times.
